meta.title: Zambia CDC 2024 Geography Syllabus — Structured RAG Dataset
meta.source: Ministry of Education, Curriculum Development Centre — GEOGRAPHY-SYLLABUS.pdf
meta.purpose: Structured curriculum data for AI-assisted quiz, lesson plan, and assessment generation. Each record maps to one embeddable chunk aligned to official CDC competences.
meta.subject: Geography
meta.extractionNote: Shift-corrected extract (detected_shift=29, confidence=0.953) + deterministic CDC table parse. No fabricated content.
